subject: fix(cards): show links muted by default instead of fully hidden
body:
Links at 40% opacity with slight scale-down so users can see actions
exist without tapping. Active state brings them to full opacity and
normal scale. Better discoverability than fully hidden links.

Tags: ui, cards, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: css-migration
Semver: patch
